name: Blossoming Onion
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 375°F.
2. Lightly spray a baking sheet with olive oil spray.
3. Peel the skin from the onions and trim the bottoms so that the onions sit flat.
4. Starting at the center of the top of each onion, cut 20 to 30 slits, cutting only three-quarters into the onion for a "flower" effect.
5. Transfer the onions to the baking sheet.
6. In a small bowl, combine the bread crumbs, garlic powder, and paprika.
7. In another bowl, whisk the egg whites lightly with a fork.
8. Pour the egg whites over the onions to cover thoroughly.
9. Sprinkle evenly with the seasoned crumbs.
10. Lightly spray with olive oil spray.
11. Bake for 40 to 50 minutes, until the onions are lightly browned.
12. Serve immediately.
